_comment: Quality floors — these values can only improve, never regress. CI and immune-gate.sh enforce this. Updated automatically when metrics improve.
_floor_realignment_note: v10: eslintErrors tightened 404→125 (unused-import/unused-var/no-useless-escape across 50+ files); e2ePassRate extended to 84/84 (desktop+iPad+iPhone); PageContainer header flexWrap fix — mobile title overlap resolved across 5+ pages.
_e2ePassRate_note: 1.0 — 84/84 across desktop (1440×900), iPad (1024×1366), iPhone (393×852). WebKit browsers installed; all viewports verified.

_targets._comment: Where we want to be in 6 months — the organism moves floor values toward these targets

_e2eActual_note: 84/84 page-e2e tests passing as of 2026-04-30 — all 3 viewports (desktop, iPad, iPhone). Playwright WebKit browsers now installed.
_note: Zero means zero. Rules we disagree with are deliberately downgraded to warnings in eslint.config.js. Everything remaining as an error must be zero.
